summary:
- publisher=TradeWinds, title=US Strait of Hormuz insurance scheme to come with strings attached, says lead underwriter, directness=high, why=Chubb CEO Evan Greenberg outlines explicit restrictions on the US-backed war risk insurance scheme targeting May 2026 transit, critical for verifying coverage eligibility; next=https://www.tradewindsnews.com/insurance/us-strait-of-hormuz-insurance-scheme-to-come-with-strings-attached-says-lead-underwriter/2-1-1979779  
- publisher=TradeWinds, title=War risk insurers halt Strait of Hormuz cover amid de facto closure, directness=high, why=Confirms active market withdrawal due to Iranian threats (Mar 2026), establishing baseline disruption prior to proposed US scheme; next=https://www.tradewindsnews.com/insurance/war-risk-insurers-halt-strait-of-hormuz-cover-amid-de-facto-closure/2-1-1952354  
- publisher=TradeWinds, title=Delayed US-backed insurance plan for Strait of Hormuz to start ‘soon’, says finance institution, directness=high, why=DFC CEO Ben Black confirms delayed launch of US-backed scheme (Apr 2026), with key eligibility criteria still unclear — direct lead for policy verification; next=https://www.tradewindsnews.com/insurance/delayed-us-backed-insurance-plan-for-strait-of-hormuz-to-start-soon-organiser-claims/2-1-1969627  
- publisher=BIMCO, title=Remember the BIMCO War Risks Clauses, directness=high, why=Official guidance urging review of charter party terms amid Persian Gulf security escalation; mandates contractual action for vessel operators; next=https://www.bimco.org/news-insights/bimco-news/2026/03/03-war-risks/  
- publisher=BIMCO, title=Shipping Through the Strait of Hormuz - War Risks and Charter Party Consequences 180 Seminar, directness=medium, why=Upcoming BIMCO training (Mar 2026) addresses legal/operational consequences — actionable for compliance teams; next=https://www.bimco.org/training-events/bimco-training/2026/0319_shipping_strait-of-hormuz/  
- publisher=TradeWinds, title=Strait of Hormuz insurance enquiries up after Trump halts Iran energy attacks, directness=medium, why=Links policy shift (Trump’s pause on strikes, Mar 2026) to increased market activity — suggests volatility window before May 2026; next=https://www.tradewindsnews.com/insurance/strait-of-hormuz-insurance-enquiries-up-after-trump-halts-iran-energy-attacks/2-1-1964586
